name: Kim Chi (Korean Cabbage Relish)
recipeIngredient: 1 Head Chinese cabbage, cut into half-inch strips
1/2 teaspoon Crushed dried hot red chile
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cut cabbage in a large bowl and cover with salted water (3 tablespoons salt per quart of water). Let stand for 5 to 10 hours.
2. Drain the cabbage thoroughly.
3. In a large jar, combine the drained cabbage with green onions, garlic, crushed red chile, and ginger root.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
5. Cover the jar tightly and refrigerate for 1 to 2 days before using.
6. The kim chi will keep in the refrigerator for several weeks. It can be used as a relish or salad.
